title: Immigration
description: Municipality registration and residence permits after arriving in Belgium.

items.title: Municipality Registration
items.description: Non-EU nationals staying longer than 90 days must register their address at the local commune/gemeente within 8 working days of arrival.
steps: Bring your passport, visa and proof of address (rental contract)
Attend the address verification visit if scheduled
Collect your residence permit card once approved
tips: Delaying registration can create complications with banking, healthcare and future visa renewals

items.title: Residence Permit
items.description: The permit type (e.g. single permit, student, family reunification) determines validity and renewal conditions.
tips: Start renewal applications well before expiry — processing can take weeks
